entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum (L.) R. Br., the target crop for introgression of the brown midrib trait

entities.name: BROWN MIDRIB
entities.description: A trait associated with reduced lignin content and increased digestibility in forage crops

entities.name: LIGNIN CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of lignin in forage crops which affects livestock forage intake and digestibility

entities.name: DIGESTIBILITY
entities.description: The ease with which forage is digested by livestock, increased by the brown midrib trait

entities.name: FORAGE INTAKE
entities.description: The amount of forage consumed by livestock, affected by lignin content

entities.name: BMR GENE
entities.description: A single recessive gene that controls the brown midrib trait in pearl millet populations

entities.name: MODIFIER GENES
entities.description: Genes that could potentially influence the expression of the bmr gene

entities.name: SELFING
entities.description: The process of continued self-pollination for 6-8 generations to derive inbred lines

entities.name: CROSSES
entities.description: Breeding crosses used to analyze the inheritance and allelism of the bmr trait

entities.name: BIOMASS POTENTIAL
entities.description: The capacity of the plant to produce biomass, identified in stable bmr inbreds

entities.name: ICMV BMR
entities.description: A population used as a source for the brown midrib trait in pearl millet

entities.name: WRAJPOP BMR
entities.description: A population used as a source for the brown midrib trait in pearl millet
